label: juggle_pairs_rally
note: FIRST GENUINE INTERLEAVED RALLY. Gate 2: ball bounced over the lintel at t=2.01s, drone threaded THAT SAME gate's window at t=2.66s (lag 0.65s). Contrast policy_v230 (raw 25), which flings the ball over all 4 gates, lets it settle at t=3.61s, then flies BACKWARDS through the windows at t=4.87/6.67/7.88 - lag 2.8-6.9s, reverse order, window 1 never. New search metric PAIRS requires bounce+thread within 1.20s; v230 scores PAIRS=0.
